Class GeminiModel

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.AbstractModel
uno.anahata.asi.gemini.GeminiModel
Direct Known Subclasses:
HardcodedGeminiModel
public class GeminiModel extends AbstractModel
Gemini-specific implementation of the AbstractModel. It wraps the native Google GenAI Model object and implements the abstract methods from the superclass by delegating to the wrapped object.
Author:
anahata-gemini-pro-2.5

  • Constructor Details

    • GeminiModel

      public GeminiModel(GeminiAiProvider provider, com.google.genai.types.Model genaiModel)

      genaiModel - the native Google GenAI model metadata.

  • Method Details

    • getGenaiModel

      private com.google.genai.types.Model getGenaiModel()
      Lazily restores or returns the native GenAI model metadata.
      Returns:
      The active Model instance.

    • getProvider

      public AbstractAiProvider getProvider()
      Gets the provider that owns this model.
      Specified by:
      getProvider in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The parent AI provider.

    • getLocalTokenizer

      private LocalTokenizer getLocalTokenizer()
      Lazily retrieves and caches the Google GenAI LocalTokenizer.

      This helper method encapsulates the initialization of Google's native LocalTokenizer, ensuring we fall back to a standard model (gemini-2.5-flash) if the requested model is not supported by the local tokenizer loader.

      Returns:
      The cached LocalTokenizer instance.

    • countTokens

      public int countTokens(String text)
      Counts the number of tokens in the given text string using this model's specific tokenizer.

      Utilizes Google's native LocalTokenizer to perform 100% accurate, offline token counting.

      Specified by:
      countTokens in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      text - The text to count tokens for.
      Returns:
      The token count, or 0 if the text is null or empty.

    • countTokens

      public int countTokens(AbstractToolCall<?,?> toolCall)
      Counts the number of tokens consumed by the given tool call in the context window.

      Model subclasses override this method to serialize the tool call into its exact wire-format (JSON, Protobuf, etc.) to ensure 100% accurate billing.

      Translates the generic Anahata tool call into its native Google GenAI Part representation (excluding any thought signatures to avoid token inflation), serializes it to JSON, and tokenizes the JSON payload using the cached LocalTokenizer.

      Specified by:
      countTokens in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      toolCall - The tool call instance to tokenize.
      Returns:
      The precise token count.

    • countTokens

      public int countTokens(byte[] data, String mimeType)
      Counts the number of tokens consumed by raw binary data based on its MIME type and model-specific multimodal billing rules.

      This generic signature provides complete decoupling from domain part classes, allowing the model to tokenize any binary payload (such as blob parts or tool attachments).

      Counts the multimodal tokens for raw binary data under Gemini's flat-rate billing scheme. Gemini typically bills a model-independent flat-rate of 258 tokens per standard image, which is preserved here.

      Specified by:
      countTokens in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      data - The raw binary data.
      mimeType - The MIME type of the binary data (e.g. "image/png").
      Returns:
      The precise token count, or 0 if the data is null or empty.

    • countTokens

      public int countTokens(AbstractToolResponse<?> toolResponse)
      Counts the number of tokens consumed by the given tool execution response.

      Model subclasses override this to serialize the response into its exact wire-format (Protobuf FunctionResponse, JSON, etc.) to ensure 100% accurate billing.

      Translates the generic Anahata tool response into a native Google GenAI FunctionResponse. It calculates the base tokens using the local offline tokenizer and manually aggregates the model-specific flat-rate tokens for each binary attachment (since Google's LocalTokenizer completely ignores FunctionResponse parts).

      Specified by:
      countTokens in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      toolResponse - The tool response instance to count.
      Returns:
      The precise, billing-identical token count.

    • getRawDescription

      public String getRawDescription()
      Gets a rich, potentially HTML-formatted description of the model, including all its metadata.

      Implementation details: Escapes special HTML characters in the model metadata to ensure safe rendering in the NetBeans HTML view.

      Specified by:
      getRawDescription in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The raw description string.

      private String escapeHtml(String text)
      Escapes special HTML characters in a string.

      text - The text to escape.
      Returns:
      The escaped text.

    • getAvailableServerTools

      public List<ServerTool> getAvailableServerTools()
      Gets the list of server-side tools available for this model.

    • getDefaultServerTools

      public List<ServerTool> getDefaultServerTools()
      Gets the list of server-side tools that should be enabled by default for this model.
      Specified by:
      getDefaultServerTools in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The list of default server tools.

    • getDefaultTemperature

      public Float getDefaultTemperature()
      Gets the default temperature for this model.

      Temperature controls the randomness of the response. Higher values (e.g., 1.0) make the output more random, while lower values (e.g., 0.2) make it more deterministic.

      Specified by:
      getDefaultTemperature in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The default temperature, or null if not specified.

    • getDefaultTopK

      public Integer getDefaultTopK()
      Gets the default topK for this model.

      Top-K sampling limits the model's choices to the K most likely next tokens.

      Specified by:
      getDefaultTopK in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The default topK, or null if not specified.

    • getDefaultTopP

      public Float getDefaultTopP()
      Gets the default topP for this model.

      Top-P (nucleus) sampling selects tokens whose cumulative probability adds up to the threshold P.

      Specified by:
      getDefaultTopP in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The default topP, or null if not specified.

    • prepareGenerateContentParameters

      private GeminiModel.GeminiGenerateContentParameters prepareGenerateContentParameters(GenerationRequest request)
      Synthesizes the history and configuration into SDK-ready parameters.
      Parameters:
      request - The source Anahata request.
      Returns:
      The prepared parameters.

    • generateContent

      public Response generateContent(GenerationRequest request)
      The core method for interacting with an AI model. It takes a configuration object and a list of messages and returns a standardized Response.
      Specified by:
      generateContent in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      request - The generation request containing config and history.
      Returns:
      A standardized Response object.

      private boolean isRetryable(Exception e)
      Serious intelligence to detect whether it is retriable or not.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception to check.
      Returns:
      true if the error is considered transient/retryable.

      Generates content asynchronously using token streaming.

      generateContentStream in class AbstractModel

      observer - The observer that will receive the streaming response chunks.

    • isInterruption

      private boolean isInterruption(Throwable e)
      Checks if the given exception or any of its causes is an interruption.
      Parameters:
      e - The exception to check.
      Returns:
      true if it's an interruption, false otherwise.

    • handleChunk

      private void handleChunk(com.google.genai.types.GenerateContentResponse chunk, List<GeminiModelMessage> targets)
      Processes a single streaming chunk by appending its deltas to the corresponding target messages.
      Parameters:
      chunk - The raw chunk from the Gemini API.
      targets - The persistent ModelMessage objects being updated.

    • handleResponseMetadata

      private void handleResponseMetadata(com.google.genai.types.Candidate c, com.google.genai.types.GenerateContentResponse response, GeminiModelMessage target, int candidateCount)
      Unified handler for response metadata (finish reason, grounding).
      Parameters:
      c - The candidate object.
      response - The full response or chunk.
      target - The target Anahata message.
      candidateCount - Total number of candidates in the response.

    • getToolDeclarationJson

      public String getToolDeclarationJson(AbstractTool<?,?> tool, RequestConfig config)
      Gets the provider-specific JSON representation of a tool's declaration. This is used by the UI to show exactly what is being sent to the model.
      Specified by:
      getToolDeclarationJson in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      tool - The tool to inspect.
      config - The request configuration (e.g. to check useNativeSchemas).
      Returns:
      The JSON string representing the tool declaration.
